data.content: Confirmed existing support and gap: Loom already declares outputs per action and supports per-profile overrides, but prompt rendering still relies on static profile-rendered output data rather than resolved runtime `StepMetadata.output`. Implementation should proceed in the existing child order `c8f4 -> 0d93 -> 9727`: first add a canonical validated expected-output model plus legacy alias normalization in the bundle/runtime loaders, then rewire prompt rendering/claim paths to render from runtime step metadata, then lock behavior with parser/runtime/render/CLI regressions. No new child knots were needed.
